LanguageData.VFEI_CallAbsolver.description: Call a light trooper to assist you for 4 days. This specialist is a master assassin and will not perform any tasks other than killing. You can control them as though they were one of your own colonists. If a light trooper dies, a replacement will arrive immediately and inherit the remaining contract time.
LanguageData.VFEI_CallAbsolver.label: call light trooper
LanguageData.VFEI_CallOrbitalSlicingBeam.description: Call an orbital beam from a Whitespring flagship in orbit. The beam will travel in a direction specified by you, burning everything it touches.
LanguageData.VFEI_CallStellicGuards.description: Call a group of 6 presidential guards, ranged and melee, to aid you in battle.
LanguageData.VFEI_CallTechfriar.description: Call a scientist to assist you for 4 days. This specialist can only perform research-related tasks. You can control him as though he were one of your own colonists. You are required to keep him safe.
LanguageData.VFEI_CallTechfriar.label: call scientist
